subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-10-24 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: I hope you will read the newspaper of the Kingdom of Abha, the articles of which are the ideals of God. This newspaper will perish
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @angels, @the concourse on high, @station of the Manifestation of God
